product_data.Features: 65-inch OLED evo panel, 4K 120Hz, Dolby Vision IQ, Dolby Atmos, webOS 23, Game Optimizer with 4x HDMI 2.1 ports, AI Picture Pro

conversation_history.speaker: Buyer
conversation_history.message: Hello there! I came across your listing for the LG C3 65-inch OLED TV and I'm really impressed with the features it offers. I was wondering if there might be any room for negotiation on the price. Looking forward to hearing from you! Thank you.

conversation_history.speaker: Seller
conversation_history.message: Hello! I'm glad to hear you're interested in the LG C3 65-inch OLED TV. It's a fantastic choice with top-notch features. While I can't go below the wholesale price of $1,100, I can definitely work with you to find a price that works for both of us. Let's discuss how we can make this work for you.

conversation_history.speaker: Buyer
conversation_history.message: Thank you for the offer, I appreciate your willingness to work with me. My budget is $880, so unfortunately, I won't be able to meet the wholesale price of $1,100. If you're able to come closer to my budget, we can move forward.

conversation_history.speaker: Seller
conversation_history.message: I understand your budget considerations, but I'm unable to go below the wholesale price of $1,100 for the LG C3 65-inch OLED TV. However, I'm more than happy to help you explore any other options or answer any questions you may have about the product. Let me know how you'd like to proceed.

conversation_history.speaker: Buyer
conversation_history.message: Thank you for your understanding. I appreciate your assistance. Since the price is above my budget, I'll have to decline the offer for now. If there are any future promotions or discounts that bring it closer to my budget, please let me know.

conversation_history.speaker: Seller
conversation_history.message: I completely understand. Thank you for considering the LG C3 65-inch OLED TV. I'll definitely keep you in mind if there are any future promotions or discounts that align more closely with your budget. Feel free to reach out if you have any questions in the future. Thank you for your interest!

conversation_history.message: You're very welcome! I'm here to help whenever you need. Thank you for considering the LG C3 65-inch OLED TV, and don't hesitate to reach out if you have any questions in the future. Have a great day!
